title: schoenoplectiella roylei
intro: Schoenoplectiella roylei, also known as the Indian clubrush, is a type of aquatic plant species in the sedge family, Cyperaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in Ayurvedic medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been found to be effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Schoenoplectiella roylei include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and help manage diabetes due to its antioxidant and anti-diabetic properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and rhizomes of this plant are often used to make teas, decoctions, and infusions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
